case_title: HUI PING ZHAI VS. LILY YOUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF HUI PING ZHAI APPEARED, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER JEFF DINN AND EDWARD CHU. DEFENDANT LILY YOUNG APPEARED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAI, HUI PING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, LILY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
